center.name: 西北省 (南非)
center.summary: 西北省 (南非)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Karoo thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in South Africa, where it is present in Little Namaqualand, the Karoo and Northern Cape, Free State, Gauteng, Limpopo, Mpumalanga and parts of the North West Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in South Africa, where it is present in Little Namaqualand, the Karoo and Northern Cape, Free State, Gauteng, Limpopo, Mpumalanga and parts of the North West Province
